proposal_summary: Proposal to withdraw Noun 181 (Sasquatch) from the escrow contract back to the DAO treasury so that Proposal 428 can be successfully executed.

disclosed_entities.name: Noun 181
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The infamous Sasquatch, Noun 181, has continued to elude us.

disclosed_entities.name: Treasury / DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: bring it back to the treasury... withdraw the noun from escrow into the DAO

disclosed_entities.name: Escrow Contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: that noun is currently held in the escrow contract

claimed_actions.raw_action: withdraw the noun from escrow into the DAO
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Moves Noun 181 from the escrow contract to the DAO treasury to allow Proposal 428 to execute.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The transaction on this prop would use the appropriate transaction to withdraw the noun from escrow into the DAO and allow the original prop to be executed as intended.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires a single transaction to transfer a token from an escrow contract to the treasury.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The transaction on this prop would use the appropriate transaction to withdraw the noun from escrow into the DAO

limitations: No explicit contract addresses or function names are provided in the proposal text.
